title: The Fox Den Collection
description: A mod created for my private server adding a lot of small and random things, all toggalble via config file.
body:
# 🏳️‍🌈 The Fox Den Collection Mod (For Fabric/Quilt)
This mod is a compilation of various features that i've developed for my private server.
Each feature can be turned On or Off via the config files.

Feel free to use it, but do note that as this mod is intended for the personal enjoyment of my friends and I, it's likly that i will add, remove or changes feature without warning.
For this very same reason, it's very unlikly that i would take sugestion, ideas, or compaints into acount, other than bug fixes or balancing.

# 🧰 Installation
This mod needs to be installed on both client and server sides and requires the Fabric or Quilt loader.

# 📖 Content

- New armors : 
  - Space Rangers Set(from Toys Story)
  - Bone Armor Set
  - Knight Armor Set (crafted with Steel)
  - Iron and Dimaond wolf/dog armors. (Created using Simithing Templates)
  - Bike helmet (uncraftable, may be dropped by zombie wearing it. Provide fall protection).
- New items :
  - Cheese and Blue Cheese
  - Yeast
  - Steel Blend and Steel Ingot
  - Bucket Of Oil
  - French Fries (or Chips, depanding of your country)
  - Poutine (the canadian dishe)
  - Rotten Leather (a way to make Leather from Rotten Flesh)
  - Upgrade Template for Iron and Diamond (same feature present in my other mod : 
- New Block :
  - Wall variants for every leaves block. 🍃
- New Functionality
  - Dragon Egg alwas spawn on dragon kill. 🥚
  - All mobs have a small random size variation.
  - Attributes that provide chance of double block loot (one for each tool, and a generic one applying on top of it. Default value is 0, max is 100). Bonus drop dont apply if using Silk Touch, to prevent to much block dupping exploit, as there's no easy way to check if the blocks has been placed by the player or is from natural gen :
    - `fox_den:player.bonus_breaking`<-- Apply only to blocks affected by the other attributes. So no block dupping (expect for shovelable blocks ...)
    - `fox_den:player.bonus_harvest` <-- Apply to every block that are crops and fully mature. (Will increase seed droped too, might change this later).
    - `fox_den:player.bonus_mining` <-- Apply only to block tagged as ore
    - `fox_den:player.bonus_shoveling`  <-- Apply only to block tagged as mineable/shovel
    - `fox_den:player.bonus_logging` <-- Apply only to block tagged as logs


# ⚙ Configuration and compatibility
Every fonctionality can be disabled via the config file. It should be self explanatory. Some items are grouped together, for exemple, most food items are on a single group as disabling one would render the other recipes impossible.
